content: By integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into the existing Self-Refine iterative framework, we can build a multi-perspective self-feedback loop that avoids the local optimum trap of single-perspective self-criticism while retaining Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data. This hybrid approach unlocks stronger self-improvement capability for LLMs across reasoning, code generation, and open-ended writing tasks.
